summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard independently. No close, merge, fix, or PR-raise actions are planned because this job disables instant close, low-signal close, merge, and fix PRs. Security-sensitive linked refs are quarantined exactly; the five open inventory PRs are kept open for their existing maintainer/author review paths.
